Analytics charts are unavailable for thi: Analytics charts are unavailable for this property type
Analytics help activations: Number of transitions to state 1 and average duration of each active interval.
Analytics help active_time: How long the parameter stayed in state 1 (in seconds/human readable format).
Analytics help increment: Total increment over the period. For counters, average hourly increment may also be used.
Analytics help max: Maximum recorded value and when it occurred.
Analytics help median: Median is the middle value: 50% of values are below and 50% above.
Analytics help min: Minimum recorded value and when it occurred.
Analytics help p10: P10 is the value below which 10% of observations fall for the selected period.
Analytics help p90: P90 is the value below which 90% of observations fall for the selected period.
Analytics help stddev: StdDev shows how strongly values vary around the mean.
Analytics help trend: Overall trend for the period: total change and direction (up/down/flat).
Base mode used (selected type requires n: Base mode used (selected type requires numeric property)
Chart detail description: Controls chart data aggregation level. Auto merges nearby points (faster on large ranges), Raw shows every history record without aggregation.
Chart type description area: Line with filled area below, emphasizing level and magnitude.
Chart type description areaspline: Smoothed line with filled area below.
Chart type description bullet: Current value relative to range and average.
Chart type description column: Values are shown as vertical columns for easy comparison.
Chart type description delta: Shows change between neighboring values (delta). Available as columns, line, or spline.
Chart type description heatmap24: Activity by hour and weekday (24x7 matrix).
Chart type description heatmap24value: Average numeric value by hour and weekday (24x7 matrix).
Chart type description heatmapmonth: Monthly calendar heatmap of activity by day of month.
Chart type description heatmapmonthvalue: Monthly calendar heatmap of average numeric value by day of month.
Chart type description linearea: Combination of line and translucent area for trend emphasis.
Chart type description movingavg: Noise smoothing: shows source data and moving average.
Chart type description ohlc: Interval aggregation: open/high/low/close per time bucket.
Chart type description radar24: Daily profile across 24 hours in polar view.
Chart type description spline: Smoothed line that makes trend changes visually softer.
Chart type description step: Step line, useful for discrete state transitions.
Chart type description steparea: Step line with filled area below.
Chart type description stepmarkers: Step line with markers at change points.
Chart type description timeline: Event timeline: each point is a separate change event.
Chart type description waterfall: Deltas and their cumulative total over the period.
Charts are available only for numeric an: Charts are available only for numeric and boolean properties
No history records for the selected peri: No history records for the selected period
No numeric jumps for selected period: No numeric jumps for selected period
Not enough numeric data for profile char: Not enough numeric data for profile chart
Numeric statistics require at least one: Numeric statistics require at least one numeric value
Too few data points to build a meaningfu: Too few data points to build a meaningful chart. Try a wider period or another property.
